ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird Student
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities, and conference materials

ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird Academic
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities, conference materials, and a complimentary AI industry report

ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird Professional
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities, conference materials, a complimentary AI industry report, and a VIP networking session

ticket_tiers.name: Standard Student
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities, and conference materials

ticket_tiers.name: Standard Academic
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities, conference materials, and a complimentary AI industry report

ticket_tiers.name: Standard Professional
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities, conference materials, a complimentary AI industry report, and a VIP networking session

ticket_tiers.name: Corporate
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to all sessions, networking opportunities, conference materials, a complimentary AI industry report, a VIP networking session, and a dedicated corporate booth

ticket_tiers.name: Virtual
ticket_tiers.perks: Access to live streaming of all sessions and conference materials

pricing.rationale: The tiered pricing strategy is designed to cater to different segments of attendees, with early bird discounts for students, academics, and professionals, and premium rates for corporate attendees. The pricing strategy aims to balance revenue goals with the need to attract a diverse range of attendees, while also covering the top venue daily cost of $8000.

channels.name: LinkedIn
channels.strategy: Utilize LinkedIn's targeted advertising to reach AI professionals and enthusiasts in India, focusing on sponsored content and InMail campaigns.

channels.name: Twitter/X
channels.strategy: Leverage Twitter's real-time engagement to share updates, behind-the-scenes insights, and quotes from industry leaders, using relevant hashtags like #AIinIndia and #DigitalMarketing.

channels.name: Facebook
channels.strategy: Create engaging content, including videos and infographics, to promote the event and target specific audiences, such as students and young professionals, using Facebook's advertising platform.

channels.name: Email Marketing
channels.strategy: Design and send regular newsletters to subscribers, featuring updates on the event, speaker profiles, and exclusive discounts, using email marketing automation tools to personalize the content.

channels.name: Influencer Partnerships
channels.strategy: Collaborate with local AI influencers, thought leaders, and industry experts to promote the event, share their experiences, and provide exclusive insights to their followers.

channels.name: Online Advertising
channels.strategy: Run targeted Google Ads campaigns to reach potential attendees searching for AI-related topics, and utilize native advertising on relevant websites and blogs.

timeline.action: Launch event website and early bird tickets, with a special discount for the first 100 registrants.
Start social media campaigns, including LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook, to create buzz around the event and engage with potential attendees.
Send out the first newsletter to subscribers, featuring updates on the event, speaker profiles, and exclusive discounts.
Launch influencer partnerships and start promoting the event through their social media channels.
Optimize and refine the marketing strategy based on the results of the initial campaigns and adjust the budget allocation accordingly.
Send out a reminder email to subscribers and promote the event through social media, highlighting the last chance to register at the early bird rate.
Finalize the event preparations, including logistics, catering, and audio-visual equipment, and confirm the attendance of speakers and sponsors.
Send out a final reminder email to attendees, including details on the event schedule, venue, and parking information.

key_messages: Join the AI revolution in India and stay ahead of the curve in the rapidly evolving field of artificial intelligence.
Network with industry leaders, innovators, and like-minded professionals to explore new opportunities and collaborations.
Discover the latest trends, strategies, and innovations in AI and digital marketing, and learn from the experts in the field.

outreach_templates.sponsor_subject: Partner with us to reach 1000 AI enthusiasts and professionals in India
outreach_templates.speaker_subject: Share your expertise with 1000 AI enthusiasts and professionals in India

feedback.sponsor: The sponsor suggestions are highly relevant and specific to the AI event in India, with a clear approach for outreach.
feedback.speaker: The speaker suggestions are highly relevant and specific to the AI event in India, with a clear expertise and suggested slot.
feedback.venue: The venue suggestions are relevant and provide sufficient details, but could be more specific about the location and amenities.
feedback.pricing: The pricing tiers are well-structured, but could be more detailed about the perks and benefits for each tier.
feedback.gtm: The GTM strategy is somewhat generic and could be more specific to the AI event in India, with more detailed channel strategies.
